design_language: Ultra clean, minimal, highly rounded, premium fintech, one-hand usability, zero clutter.

headings.style: tracking-tight, large titles, bold amount numbers

border_radius.general_softness: Everything should feel soft. Nothing should have sharp corners.

icons.style: Rounded outline icons, SF Symbols style. No filled heavy icons.

layout.spacing: Generous white space, highly spaced elements (p-6, p-8).
layout.structure: Mobile-first, single column. Frame as a phone on desktop.
layout.touch_targets: Very large, minimum 48x48px for all interactive elements.

bottom_navigation.style: Floating, rounded-[34px], glass effect, active tab highlighted.

key_screens.dashboard: Large greeting, Merchant name, Today's sales, Wallet balance, Pending settlements, Recent activity, Quick actions, Beautiful analytics cards. Stacked modular cards.
key_screens.pos_screen: Large amount display, Beautiful numeric keypad, Recent Items, Quick Products, Customer, Notes, Discount, Tax, Tip, Collect Button. Very large touch targets.
key_screens.transactions: Apple Wallet inspired. Swipeable floating cards, expandable details.
key_screens.orders: Large Order Cards, Status Chips, Preparation Progress.
key_screens.more_screen: iOS Settings style grouped cards (Business Profile, Employees, Devices, etc.).
key_screens.ai_assistant: Floating green glowing orb. Opens chat bottom sheet with merchant Q&A.
key_screens.success_screen: Large Green Tick, Gradient Background, Confetti, Transaction ID.

image_urls.description: Smiling cafe merchant woman for dashboard greeting.
Assorted breakfast pastries and coffee cups for POS quick products.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components use the EXACT hex codes specified.
Apply custom border radius variables (e.g. `rounded-[24px]`) as defined above instead of standard tailwind radii.
Implement glassmorphism for Header, Navigation, and Bottom Sheets using `backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70`.
Use `lucide-react` with thin/outline strokes mimicking SF Symbols.
Build a mobile-first app layout; restrict max-width to mobile sizes (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto) with a subtle shadow and border to mimic a phone screen on desktop.
NEVER use placeholder text for images. Use the provided media URLs.
Use framer-motion or tailwind animate-in classes for the required soft transitions.
